# GitHub Repository Settings

Configure these in GitHub Settings after making the repo public.

## About (Description)

```
Modern Web UI for Samba 4 Active Directory Domain Controller. Manage users, groups, OUs, DNS, GPOs, and more.
```

## Website

```
https://github.com/edimarlnx/samba-conductor
```

## Topics (Tags)

```
samba
active-directory
ldap
domain-controller
ad-management
samba4
meteor
react
tailwindcss
docker
self-hosted
admin-panel
identity-management
user-management
dns-management
group-policy
disaster-recovery
open-source
```

## Social Preview

Use `media/logo-dark.png` as the social preview image (Settings > Social Preview).

## Features to Enable

- [x] Issues
- [x] Projects
- [x] Wiki (optional — docs/ may be enough)
- [x] Discussions (for community Q&A)
- [ ] Sponsorship (configure FUNDING.yml first)

## Branch Protection (main)

- [x] Require pull request reviews before merging
- [x] Require status checks to pass before merging
- [ ] Require signed commits (optional)

## Pages (optional)

If you want docs as a website:

- Source: Deploy from `docs/` folder on `main` branch
